artPrompt: An explosive multiplying swirl of cheerful volunteers sprouting upward from the town green like a tangled vine, each figure reaching back to pull two more from the leafy ground, the chain spiraling toward the top of a wide frame until the crowd overflows past picket fences and casserole tables. Golden afternoon light, green and ivory tones, joyful chaos of waving arms and blank clipboards. A wholesome civic surge tipping into pleasant overwhelm, composed for a landscape framing, rendered as a vibrant gouache storybook illustration — saturated matte color, simplified flat-ish shapes, soft painterly edges, decorative.
name: Grassroots to the Power of Grassroots
text:
Let N be the number of Voters you control. Create Voter tokens until you control N to the power of N Voters... then stop, because that number got out of hand around the third Voter and the table is uncomfortable.
In practice: create twice as many 1/1 green and white Voter creature tokens as you currently control. Tell yourself it was exponential. It felt exponential.
flavorText: Each volunteer recruits two volunteers, who each recruit two volunteers, and that's how the whole town ends up at one potluck.

extras.impossibleMath: N^N then walked back to doubling
